title: Condominium corporation learns that personal information consists of more than just contact information
summary: An individual was involved in a dispute with a condominium corporation, in which the corporation alleged in a letter that she had contravened a corporation by-law. She was concerned that the corporation had sent a copy of its letter to her about the matter to all of the condominium owners in the complex. It also posted the letter on a bul...
dedupKey: condominium corporation learns that personal information consists of more than just contact information|2006-03-06
